name: Final Growth Readiness Classification
phase: Phase E - Release Closeout, Evidence Ledger, And Growth Handoff
decision: The Growth Readiness Board is complete as an evidence, architecture, QA, monitoring, and handoff workstream. Mitra Auto is not release-ready and not growth-ready because live production blockers, Figma Make parity, provider readback, platform readback, and owner approvals remain unresolved.

stageGateResults.basis: Phase A closed route, schema, content, product, and board-contract inventory.
Public route contracts, slug policy, product/service/local/schema/content plans, KPI tree, and monitoring contracts exist.
Local source/runtime work completed, but Figma Make source parity and deployed checkout/function parity remain unverified.
Unresolved blockers remain: public /cms exposure, broken deployed robots/sitemaps/feed, missing redirects, soft-404s, checkout URL-state bug, provider gaps, and platform readback unavailable.
Stable measurement, Search Console, Merchant Center, GBP, analytics, field performance, conversion quality, owner approvals, and platform diagnostics are not verified.

phaseReconciliation.summary: Audit, source inventory, route/product URL contract, local/schema/business facts, content/product backlog, and board standard are complete.
Technical and product SEO runtime source work is complete locally; production redirect/sitemap/feed/schema/checkout behavior required Phase E evidence and remains blocked live.
Local/service/product/schema content readiness is complete locally; GBP/citation/platform and owner fact approvals remain open.
Measurement, reconciliation, platform-readback protocol, conversion/accessibility QA, and experiment monitoring contracts are complete locally; authenticated platform proof remains blocked.
Figma Make ledger, Supabase/hosting ledger, live crawl/browser evidence, drift baseline, monitoring handoff, and final classification are complete. Release remains no-go.

blockingFindings.title: Public /cms exposes unauthenticated admin/private-looking content
blockingFindings.source: E-3 live browser evidence and E-4 drift baseline
blockingFindings.verification: Unauthenticated /cms and private/admin/account routes return 401, 403, or safe 404 and no private content renders.

blockingFindings.title: SEO static assets and Merchant feed are not deployed correctly
blockingFindings.source: E-2, E-3, and E-4 public HTTP evidence
blockingFindings.verification: robots.txt returns 200 text/plain; sitemap.xml and sitemap-products.xml return XML; merchant-products.xml returns XML feed.

blockingFindings.title: Figma Make is stale relative to local source and preview remains unverified
blockingFindings.verification: Patch listed /Figma/src files and verify preview no longer throws CONTACT_INFO or stale import errors.

blockingFindings.title: Legacy redirects and opaque product ID redirects are not active on www host
blockingFindings.source: E-3 live HTTP and E-4 drift baseline
blockingFindings.verification: Legacy URL samples and product UUID/SKU/ID samples permanently redirect one hop to the closest canonical slug URL.

blockingFindings.title: Invalid and accidental route variants are HTTP 200 soft-404s
blockingFindings.source: E-3 live HTTP/browser and E-4 drift baseline
blockingFindings.verification: Unknown routes return 404 or 410; intended variants redirect to canonical equivalents.

blockingFindings.title: Checkout can render on product URL after cart action
blockingFindings.verification: Checkout navigation updates to /checkout, stays noindex, and does not remove/corrupt product canonical state.

blockingFindings.title: Cloudflare/provider authenticated readback is unavailable
blockingFindings.verification: Authenticated Cloudflare account, zone, Pages/project, routes, headers, redirects, and deployment state readback is captured without secrets.

blockingFindings.title: Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, logs, and field performance are unavailable
blockingFindings.source: D-3 platform readback and E-4 monitoring handoff
blockingFindings.verification: Authenticated readback confirms ownership, submitted assets, diagnostics, events, conversions, and field evidence.

blockingFindings.title: Paytrail checkout revalidation deployed parity is unverified
blockingFindings.verification: Deploy/read back payments_create_paytrail after local checkout revalidation changes and verify server-side price/stock revalidation.

nextOwnerTasks: Patch Figma Make /Figma/src files listed in E-1 and verify preview.
Block or authenticate /cms and private/admin/account routes before any public release.
Deploy/verify robots.txt, sitemap.xml, sitemap-products.xml, and merchant-products.xml with correct content types and bodies.
Deploy/verify legacy redirects and product ID-to-slug redirects on the www host.
Fix HTTP status behavior for unknown/retired routes and intentional route variants.
Fix checkout navigation state and rerun browser commerce smoke.
Confirm Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, and field-performance readback.
Verify product page, schema, feed, cart, and checkout data agreement after deployment.
Record owner-approved exceptions only where a blocker is intentionally accepted with mitigation and expiry.
noGuarantee: This classification governs implementation quality and release risk. It does not guarantee crawling, indexing, selected canonicals, rankings, rich results, local-pack visibility, Merchant Center approval, traffic, conversions, revenue, or AI inclusion.
